title: Longwood Gardens
desc: World-renowned botanical garden with 1,100 acres of gardens, meadows, and woodlands. Stunning seasonal displays and a spectacular fountain show.

title: Brandywine River Museum of Art
desc: Housed in a converted grist mill, showcasing the Wyeth family art collection and American illustration, landscape, and still life paintings.

title: Stroud Preserve
desc: 940-acre nature preserve with miles of hiking trails through meadows and woodlands. Great for birding, wildlife watching, and trail running.

title: Uptown Knauer Performing Arts Center
desc: Downtown West Chester's premier venue for live theater, music, dance, comedy, and film in a beautifully restored historic building.

title: Chester County History Center
desc: Interactive museum exploring Chester County's rich history from colonial times to today, with rotating exhibits and a research library.

title: Downtown West Chester Shopping
desc: Walkable downtown packed with boutiques, antique shops, bookstores, and specialty stores along Gay Street, Market Street, and Church Street.

title: QVC Studio Tour
desc: Tour the QVC broadcasting studios in West Chester and see behind the scenes of live television shopping. Free tours available.

title: Brandywine Creek State Park
desc: Beautiful state park with 12+ miles of trails through forests and meadows along Brandywine Creek. Great for hiking, fishing, and cross-country skiing.

title: American Helicopter Museum
desc: The largest helicopter museum in the country, featuring 35+ aircraft and interactive exhibits. Helicopter rides available seasonally.

title: West Chester University Campus Walk
desc: Stroll through the beautiful WCU campus with its mix of historic and modern architecture, public art installations, and the S. Quad green space.

title: Chadds Ford Winery
desc: Family-owned winery offering tastings of award-winning wines in a rustic barn setting with a view of the Brandywine Valley.

title: West Chester Railroad
desc: Heritage railroad offering scenic 90-minute train rides through Chester County countryside. Special themed rides for holidays.

title: Everhart Park
desc: West Chester's beloved town park with a playground, tennis courts, open fields, walking paths, and a bandshell for summer concerts.

title: Escape Room West Chester
desc: Immersive escape room experiences with multiple themed rooms. Great for team building, date nights, or friend outings.

title: Craft Beer Trail
desc: Hit West Chester's craft breweries — Sterling Pig, Iron Hill, Artillery Brewing, and Bierhaul — all within walking distance downtown.

title: West Chester Public Library
desc: Historic public library hosting regular book discussions, art exhibits, children's story times, and community programs.

title: Hagley Museum & Library
desc: The original DuPont gunpowder works along the Brandywine River. Explore 235 acres of gardens, a workers' community, and the du Pont ancestral home.

title: Winterthur Museum & Gardens
desc: Henry Francis du Pont's former estate with the premier collection of American decorative arts and a stunning 1,000-acre naturalistic garden.
